question1.description:
A streaming platform decided to migrate part of its system to microservices. Now authentication, catalog, and recommendations work as independent services.
Which quality attribute is most favored by this decision?

question2.description:
An image processing system uses Pipe and Filter. Each filter applies a different transformation before sending the result to the next stage.
Which advantage of this architecture is most evident?

choices.correct: Ease of modifying filters in isolation

question3.description:
A company realized that its microservices system started experiencing delays due to excessive network communication between services.
This situation represents a disadvantage mainly related to:
